next_action: Use an explicit benchmark runner to repeat the clean live run under sequential read-only codex exec workers, then classify stability before suite expansion while keeping lift unclaimed.
overclaim_boundary: codex exec is not continuous goal conversation; it is an explicit worker lane, and repeated clean three-task evidence still does not prove lift below the 20-task gate.
rationale: Interactive goals and worker evals solve different problems. Goal 029 keeps live mode explicit and uses the stability gate to decide suite-expansion review readiness without pretending to be an autonomous conversational loop.
